zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Russell於1671年12月29日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂時，他的父親Ralph Russell11668歲，母親Mary Hitchcock33歲。他於1694年2月27日與Esther Tuttle在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1724年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年52歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文西摩格亞特 希爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Russell于1671年12月29日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂时，他的父亲Ralph Russell11668岁，母亲Mary Hitchcock33岁。他于1694年2月27日与Esther Tuttle在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1724年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年52岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文西摩格亞特 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.
The city served as co-capital of Connecticut from 1701 until 1873

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Russell was born on 29 December 1671, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Ralph Russell, was 11668 and his mother, Mary Hitchcock, was 33. He married Esther Tuttle on 27 February 1694, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 26 June 1724, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 52, and was buried in Great Hill Cemetery, Seymour, New Haven, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Russell est né le 29 décembre 1671, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Ralph Russell, avait 11668 ans et sa mère, Mary Hitchcock, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Esther Tuttle le 27 février 1694, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juin 1724, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Great Hill Cemetery, Seymour, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Russell am 29. Dezember 1671 in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Russell 11668 und seine Mutter Mary Hitchcock 33. Er hat am 27. Februar 1694 in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Esther Tuttle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juni 1724 im Alter von 52 Jahren in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Great Hill Cemetery, Seymour, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Russell è nato il il 29 dicembre 1671 nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Ralph Russell, aveva 11668 anni e il suo madre, Mary Hitchcock, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Esther Tuttle il 27 febbraio 1694, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Russellが1671年12月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで生まれた時，父Ralph Russellは11668歳，母Mary Hitchcockは33歳であった。1694年2月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンでEsther Tuttleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1724年6月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンで52歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンセイモウルグレアト ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Russell(이)가 1671년 12월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Russell(은)는 11668세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Hitchcock(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1694년 2월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 Esther Tuttle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1724년 6월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 세이모우르 그리트 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Russell родился 29 декабря 1671 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Ralph Russell было 11668 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Hitchcock, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Esther Tuttle 27 февраля 1694 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 26 июня 1724 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности грит хилл кеметири, симоур, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Russell nació el 29 de diciembre de 1671, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Ralph Russell, tenía 11668 años y su mamá, Mary Hitchcock, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Esther Tuttle el 27 de febrero de 1694, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de junio de 1724, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Great Hill Cemetery, Seymour, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
